name: Absolutely Apricot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine water, bread flour, nonfat dried milk, and salt.
3. Mix in the applesauce, apricot jam, dried chopped apricots, and yeast until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
5. Place the pan in the oven and turn off the heat.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty on top.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
